sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 93 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.29. 2. For orders on CMA No.938/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.05.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel states that the order impugned is that of remand, he will appear before the relevant authority and contest the case based on record available. In view hereof submits that the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
